_comment: L1 conformance — adds severity + category + status to each warning. Conceptually L1 is 'classified L0': you're labeling the issue but not yet tracking its lifecycle (no fingerprint, no first_seen/last_seen, no count). The next step (L2) adds the lifecycle fields to enable cross-run deduplication.

report.summary: Two retrieval issues classified by severity

warnings.message: Vector store returned 0 hits for the query
